Description:
Gyeon Q2M Bathe+ is the world's first pH-neutral SiO2 based car wash shampoo. Leaving an ultra-slick layer of SiO2 polymeric protection, that will not only clean the surface gently and rinses very easily, but also will add further gloss and hydrophobicity your cars paint surface.

Q2M Bathe Plus will surprise any user on its self-cleaning ability, helping repel water, dirt, grime and other contaminants making wash maintenance easier and quicker whilst leaving a layer of protection between washes.

Use Gyeon Q2M Bathe+ in conjunction with your Gyeon Wash Mitt and Two-Bucket Method for best results and to avoid any chances of marring your paint during the wash process.

Gyeon Bathe+ offers what no other brand or washes do; it offers the ability to add further protection and more hydrophobic properties to any car whether protected or not!

So combine this added protection for your next wash, a safe but effective pH Neutral wash shampoo and you have a class leading car wash shampoo from Gyeon Quartz!

Reviews Summary (AI-generated from 35 most recent customer reviews):
Customers say this car wash product leaves vehicles feeling silky smooth after cleaning. Many reviews mention the water-repelling effect on surfaces. While some note it doesn't produce much foam, users appreciate how a small amount goes a long way. The wash is particularly popular for its ease of use and the glossy finish it provides. Common feedback includes the product's effectiveness in bucket washes and with wash mitts. Reviews frequently highlight the smooth application process and lasting shine.

Customer Reviews:

"Great product. Always leave the car looking clean and shiny. Super easy to hose the dirt off."

Christopher I. (Verified Buyer, VIC, Professional - Advanced, Age 55-64) - 5/5 stars - 1 year ago:
"The best Ceramic car shampoo I've used couldn't be happier with the product."

Gyeon Q2M Bathe+

500ml - $36.99

- https://www.carcareproducts.com.au/cdn/shop/files/116162_5.jpg?v=1742434968
- https://www.carcareproducts.com.au/cdn/shop/files/116027_b84d74dc-68eb-47a4-9ccb-8fae03c8014a.jpg?v=1742434968

Description:
Q²M Bathe+ is the world's first pH-neutral car wash shampoo infused with SiO₂, providing a strong hydrophobic layer with every wash. This revolutionary product repels water, dirt, and reduces the need for frequent washing. Slick and easy to use, it enhances your vehicle's protection and delivers a joyful washing experience with Gyeon's signature scent.

Product Features and Benefits:
- Highly concentrated formula for maximum cleaning power
- pH-neutral and safe for all surfaces, including wrapped
- Superb lubrication and slickness for a scratch-free wash
- Hydrophobic effect for added protection and water-beading properties
- Biodegradable and eco-friendly

When it comes to all-in-one products, Q²M Bathe+ can be claimed to be revolutionary! Just a quick wash is good for obtaining a marvellous hydrophobic effect and easy maintenance for the next couple of weeks. It is a phenomenal solution for the wintertime, when washing gets harder and the boost in self-cleaning abilities improves the comfort of vehicle maintenance. Its highly concentrated formula ensures maximum cleaning power with just a small amount of product, making it a cost-effective choice for car enthusiasts and detailers alike. Moreover, its pH-neutral formula makes it safe for all surfaces, including wrapped finishes, without the risk of damaging the paintwork or leaving any streaks or water spots.

Q²M Bathe+ is perfectly safe on all surfaces, including paint, rims, glass and plastic and it will add instant protection to bare surfaces or boost the base quartz coating you already have on these surfaces. It can also be used over existing natural waxes or sealants, improving their durability and gloss. The active SIO2 ingredient adds real protection that you can see every time you wash. Unlike many so-called "wash and wax" shampoos, you are left with added hydrophobicity and self-cleaning ability that keeps your car actively cleaner for longer.

Gyeon Q2M Bathe+ also delivers a hydrophobic effect that provides added protection against environmental contaminants, such as acid rain, bird droppings, and UV rays, while also enhancing the shine and gloss of the paintwork. The hydrophobic effect creates water-beading properties that help to repel water and prevent it from sticking to the surface, making it easier to dry and maintain your car's appearance.

How To Use:
There are 3 ways of using Q²M Bathe+. Dilute it and use as a regular shampoo with hydrophobic properties, spray on the car with a foam lance or simply spread it on the wet, clean paintwork with a microfibre wash mitt. Always work on cool paint, never in direct sunlight. Work in sections and never let the product dry. With Gyeon Q2M Bathe+, you can enjoy a superior car wash experience that delivers exceptional results while also protecting the environment.

Specifications:
CONSUMPTION: 15-20ml/car
PH LEVEL: 6
SIO2 PERCENTAGE: <5%
DURABILITY: up to 8 weeks
DURABILITY: 3/5
GLOSS: 4/5
BEADING: 4/5
HARDNESS: 1/5
SELF-CLEANING: 4/5

Instant beading:
Q²M Bathe+ made history as the world's first pH-neutral shampoo containing SiO₂. Even a brief wash imparts a robust hydrophobic layer, repelling water, dirt, and delaying the need for the next wash. The washing experience is truly enjoyable, featuring the shampoo's exceptional slickness and leaving a glossy finish.

Instant hydrophobics:
Q²M Bathe+ is entirely safe on all surfaces, including paint, rims, glass, and plastic. It provides instant protection to bare surfaces or enhances the base ceramic coating already applied. Additionally, it can be used over existing natural waxes or sealants, improving their durability and gloss. With its active SiO₂ ingredient, Q²M Bathe+ adds tangible protection that becomes evident with every wash. Unlike many so-called 'wash and wax' shampoos, it leaves your vehicle with increased hydrophobicity and self-cleaning ability, actively maintaining a cleaner appearance for an extended period.

Description:
Q²M Bathe+ is the world's first pH neutral shampoo containing SiO2. Even a quick wash leaves a strong hydrophobic layer, repelling water, dirt and prolonging the need for a next wash. The wash itself is a real joy, while the shampoo is very slick and has a scent characteristic of the whole Gyeon range.

Specifications:
CONSUMPTION: 15-20ml/car
PH LEVEL: 6
SiO2 PERCENTAGE: <5%
DURABILITY: up to 8 weeks

WORLD'S FIRST SiO2 SHAMPOO WITH INSTANT HYDROPHOBICITY:
Q²M Bathe+ is perfectly safe on all surfaces including paint, rims, glass and plastic and it will add instant protection to bare surfaces or boost the base quartz coating you already have on these surfaces. It can also be used over existing natural waxes or sealants improving their durability and gloss. The active SiO2 ingredient adds real protection that you can see every time you wash, unlike many so called 'wash and wax' shampoos, you are left with added hydrophobicity and self-cleaning ability that keeps your car actively cleaner for longer.

EASY TO USE:
When it comes to all-in-one products, Q²M Bathe+ can be claimed to be revolutionary! Just a quick wash is enough to obtain a marvelous hydrophobic effect and easy maintenance for the next couple of weeks. It is a phenomenal solution for the wintertime, when washing gets harder and the boost in self-cleaning abilities improves the comfort of vehicle maintenance.

ADVICE ON APPLICATION AND PRECAUTIONS:
Q²M Bathe+ might be used as a regular maintenance shampoo with hydrophobic properties added. Dilute 15-20ml in 15L of water and wash with straight-forward motion using a high quality mitt. For maximum hydrophobicity, pour a few drops on the mitt and spread over a clean and wet car. Rinse well with a pressure washer. Q²M Bathe+ might be also used as a hydrophobic snow foam with a quality foam lancer.

Performance Ratings:
DURABILITY: 3/5
GLOSS: 4/5
BEADING: 4/5
HARDNESS: 1/5
SELF-CLEANING: 4/5

Slippery Wash & Coat:
There are three ways to use Q²M Bathe+. You can dilute it for use as a regular shampoo with hydrophobic properties, spray it on the car with a foam lance, or simply spread it on wet, clean paintwork with a microfiber wash mitt.
TIP: Always work on cool paint, avoiding direct sunlight. Work in sections and never allow the product to dry.

FAQ:

How come Bathe+ is not as foamy?
Bathe+ emphasizes slipperiness and water beading, and foam does not determine a shampoo's safety. Consider waterless and rinseless washes, which are often non-foaming but provide excellent slickness.

What's the dilution ratio for foam cannons?
Mix anywhere between 1:5~1:10 with water. Same for hand held foaming pumps.

What's more important, slickness or foam?
We vote slickness because that's how rinseless and waterless wash products work; the slippery solution helps prevent scratching. While foam technically lifts soil off the surface more effectively, during contact washing, it's important to prioritize slickness.

Anything else I should know?
Always wash in the shade and avoid direct sunlight. Do not allow the product to dry, and it's best to work on half a vehicle at a time. If you allow the product to dry, it may leave streaks. Simply return and wash the area again or touch up with a quick detailer. Bathe+ is a godsend when it comes to washing wheels, suspension, and undercarriage. It cleans and protects in one go.

Product Information:
- High end car shampoo that also leaves behind a durable layer of protection
- pH neutral, high lubricity formula
- Adds durable layer of protection
- Boosts durability of existing layers of protection
- Safe on paint, glass, trim, wheels, etc.
- Works great with Gyeon Smoothie wash mitt

Product Description:
Gyeon Bathe+ is a high quality shampoo, packed with SiO2 coating technology! This combination takes all of the awesome Gyeon Bathe attributes (pH neutral, high lubricity, thorough cleaning power), and adds in SiO2, which is the essence of popular Gyeon coatings. Bathe+ is safe on all surfaces including paint, rims, glass and plastic and it will add instant protection to these surfaces, or boost any protection already applied. Simply wash your car the same way you would with any other auto shampoo, rinse off, and stand back to admire the results. The hydrophobic surface will bead water like crazy and repel future dirt and contamination for a least a few weeks. This not only keeps your vehicle cleaner for longer, but it also helps make future cleanings much easier and less time consuming. Grab a bottle of the Gyeon Bathe+ and protect your car while washing!

Tip: Works great when paired with the Gyeon Smoothie wash mitt!

From The Label:
Super-slick wash with strong and long lasting hydrophobicity.
- Slickness for a safe wash
- 3 methods of use
- Instant hydrophobicity

Directions:
Shake well before use. Pour 15-20 ml into a bucket. Washing the car with a HQ wash mitt in a straight line motion and starting from the top is recommended. For maximum beading, apply a few drops on the mitt and spread over the rinsed surface. Rinse again with clean water. Do not let dry. Do not wash in direct sunlight. Dry with suitable drying towel. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN.

Customer Reviews (92% would buy again, based on 12 ratings):

Sean A. (DI Verified Purchase, 5/26/2025):
"This is been my go to maintenance shampoo since 2017/2018. Zero complaints. I have not noticed any change in the formulation. I apply it via a foam cannon, followed by a mitt with a bucket filled it too."

Ira G. (DI Verified Purchase, 8/28/2021):
"I am very impressed with Bathe. Used as directed using the two bucket method and then a second pass at full strength. As already mentioned this is a low suds product. May try it with the pressure washer next time. I used it first on my coated 19' Mustang and then on my wife's new uncoated Volvo. Both cars looked great (well as great as white can get). Then topped it off with the new Gyeon ceramic detailer. Quite the 1,2 punch. Highly recommend!!"

Roderick J. (DI Verified Purchase, 7/1/2021):
"Not much bubbly action but reacts very well with the ceramic coat finish. Rinses away very clean and enhances the shine tremendously. Strongly suggested to use this product if your car has been ceramic coated!"
